posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

With Make.com, failed runs will create a queue that can then later be run when the problem is resolved. Be able to do the same with Workflows.

What are you trying to achieve

When a Workflow Builder fails, you have to start the entire process from scratch in order to get the Workflow Builder starting again. This can cause many issues depending on the process workflow. Instead, if it can queue it and re-run it when the problem is resolved, that’d increase success with less issues down the line.
